title: Midnight Medjool
description: A buttery, crispy, medjool date-based dish featuring nuts in a sous-vide preparation for an indulgent midnight snack.
instructions: In a small saucepan, gently heat the softened butter over low heat.
Add chopped Medjool dates and half of the almonds. Mix well with the melted butter and allow them to simmer for about 3 minutes until warm but not fully cooked.
Transfer the date mixture into your preheated sous-vide bag, seal it, and cook on 82°C (179°F) for 45 minutes.
After cooking, remove from the machine. Add remaining almonds and chopped walnuts to the prepared medjool dates. Mix well with the lemon juice just before serving.
Garnish each portion with a few walnut pieces if desired.
Serve hot or at room temperature as an indulgent snack.
